name: Algolia
description: Search-as-a-service platform providing fast, relevant search experiences via hosted APIs.

name: Typesense
description: Open-source typo-tolerant search engine optimized for speed and instant search experiences.

name: Meilisearch
description: Open-source, lightning-fast search engine with typo tolerance and easy-to-use RESTful API.

name: Elasticsearch
description: Distributed search and analytics engine for full-text search, logging, and real-time data.

name: OpenSearch
description: Community-driven, open-source search and analytics suite forked from Elasticsearch 7.10.

name: Apache Solr
description: Open-source enterprise search platform built on Apache Lucene with advanced full-text capabilities.

name: Swiftype
description: Elastic-powered site search and enterprise search service with easy integration for websites.

name: AddSearch
description: Site search service that provides fast and relevant search results for websites and apps.

name: Pinecone
description: Managed vector database for building high-performance semantic search and AI applications.

name: Weaviate
description: Open-source vector database for building semantic search and AI-native applications at scale.

name: Qdrant
description: Open-source vector similarity search engine optimized for neural network embeddings and filtering.

name: Chroma
description: Open-source embedding database designed for AI applications with simple developer experience.

name: Milvus
description: Open-source vector database built for scalable similarity search across billions of vectors.

name: Google Search Console
description: Free Google tool for monitoring website search performance, indexing, and SEO issues.

name: Google Custom Search
description: API for adding Google-powered search to your website or application with customizable results.

name: Coveo
description: AI-powered search and recommendations platform for enterprise websites and customer portals.

name: Yext
description: AI search platform for building search experiences across websites, apps, and knowledge bases.

name: Docsearch by Algolia
description: Free search tool by Algolia specifically designed for technical documentation websites.

name: Zinc
description: Lightweight open-source search engine written in Go as a simpler alternative to Elasticsearch.

name: Manticore Search
description: Open-source database for fast full-text search with SQL-compatible query language support.

name: Orama
description: Full-text and vector search engine that runs in the browser, on the server, or at the edge.

name: Pagefind
description: Fully static search library for indexing and searching static site content with zero hosting.

name: Lunr.js
description: Small, client-side full-text search library for JavaScript applications without external services.

name: Flexsearch
description: High-performance full-text search library for JavaScript with memory-efficient indexing.

name: ScrapingBee
description: Web scraping API handling headless browsers, proxies, and CAPTCHAs for data extraction.

name: Apify
description: Web scraping and automation platform with a cloud infrastructure and actor-based architecture.

name: Crawlee
description: Open-source Node.js library for building reliable web crawlers and scrapers with anti-blocking.

name: Bright Data
description: Web data platform with proxy networks and scraping infrastructure for large-scale data collection.

name: Scrapy
description: Open-source Python framework for extracting data from websites with a collaborative and extensible design.

name: Oxylabs
description: Premium proxy and web scraping solutions for gathering public web data at enterprise scale.

name: SerpApi
description: API for scraping search engine results from Google, Bing, and other search providers.

name: Diffbot
description: AI-powered web data extraction tool that turns websites into structured data automatically.

name: Browserless
description: Headless browser service for web scraping, screenshots, and PDF generation via API.

name: Searchkit
description: Open-source UI toolkit for building search interfaces on top of Elasticsearch and OpenSearch.

name: InstantSearch
description: Algolia's open-source UI library for building fast search and discovery experiences in React.

name: Trieve
description: Open-source search and RAG infrastructure combining full-text, semantic, and hybrid search.

name: Vespa
description: Open-source big data serving engine for search, recommendation, and real-time computation at scale.

name: Fuse.js
description: Lightweight fuzzy-search library for JavaScript with no dependencies and simple configuration.

name: Crawl4AI
description: Open-source web crawler optimized for AI and LLM data extraction and preparation.

name: Firecrawl
description: API for crawling websites and converting pages to clean markdown for LLM applications.
